title: Gordon Amherst
summary: The virologist identified by the Division as the creator of Green Poison.

claims.text: The official story recap identifies Gordon Amherst, not Vitaly Tchernenko, as the virologist who created Green Poison.
Division Agents investigate Amherst's apartment and discover his equipment and research.

paragraphs.text: Amherst is the scientific origin point of the Green Poison plot. Evidence recovered from his apartment connects his research and equipment to the engineered virus.

verification.notes: Claims are limited to the official 2020 narrative recap; motive details need direct collectible or mission locators before expansion.
